translations.en: We’re going to the mountains tomorrow.
translations.fr: Nous allons à la montagne demain.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi đi lên núi.
translations.nl: Morgen gaan we naar de bergen.
translations.hi: हम कल पहाड़ों पर जा रहे हैं।
translations.nb: I morgen drar vi til fjellet.
translations.sv: I morgon åker vi till bergen.
translations.da: I morgen tager vi til bjergene.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite verb in present tense, 1st person plural agreeing with 'Wir'; main predicate expressing travel/motion.
Temporal adverb indicating the time of the event; modifies the verb.
Contraction of the preposition 'in' with the definite article 'das'; marks direction (accusative) toward the noun in the prepositional phrase.
Common noun (neuter); object of the preposition 'ins'; accusative singular.

sentences.target: Das Gebirge sieht heute klar aus.

translations.de: Das Gebirge sieht heute klar aus.
translations.es: Hoy las montañas se ven claras.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, on voit bien les montagnes.
translations.it: Oggi le montagne si vedono bene.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天群山看起来很清晰。
translations.pt: Hoje as montanhas estão bem visíveis.
translations.vi: Hôm nay núi trông rất rõ.
translations.nl: Vandaag zijn de bergen goed zichtbaar.
translations.hi: आज पहाड़ साफ दिख रहे हैं।
translations.nb: I dag er fjellene godt synlige.
translations.da: I dag kan man se bjergene tydeligt.
translations.ja: 今日は山がはっきり見える。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; neuter nominative singular; determiner of the subject noun.
Common noun (neuter); subject in nominative singular.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; part of the separable verb 'aussehen' forming the predicate with 'aus'.
Temporal adverb modifying the predicate.
Predicate adjective expressing the state/appearance; complements the verb phrase 'sieht ... aus'.
Separable verbal particle; combines with 'sieht' to form the verb 'aussehen'.

sentences.target: Meine Eltern wandern gern im Gebirge.

translations.de: Meine Eltern wandern gern im Gebirge.
translations.en: My parents enjoy hiking in the mountains.
translations.es: A mis padres les gusta caminar por la montaña.
translations.fr: Mes parents aiment faire de la randonnée en montagne.
translations.it: Ai miei genitori piace fare escursioni in montagna.
translations.zh-Hans: 我父母喜欢在山里徒步。
translations.yue: 我父母鍾意喺山度行山。
translations.ru: Моим родителям нравится ходить по горам.
translations.pt: Meus pais gostam de fazer trilhas nas montanhas.
translations.tr: Annemle babam dağlarda yürüyüş yapmayı seviyor.
translations.vi: Bố mẹ tôi thích đi bộ đường dài ở vùng núi.
translations.nl: Mijn ouders wandelen graag in de bergen.
translations.uk: Мої батьки люблять ходити в походи в горах.
translations.hu: A szüleim szeretnek a hegyekben túrázni.
translations.hi: मेरे माता-पिता पहाड़ों में पैदल यात्रा करना पसंद करते हैं।
translations.pl: Moi rodzice lubią wędrować po górach.
translations.el: Στους γονείς μου αρέσει να κάνουν πεζοπορία στο βουνό.
translations.nb: Foreldrene mine liker å gå tur i fjellet.
translations.id: Orang tua saya suka mendaki di pegunungan.
translations.sv: Mina föräldrar tycker om att vandra i bergen.
translations.ro: Părinților mei le place să facă drumeții la munte.
translations.cs: Moji rodiče rádi chodí na túry v horách.
translations.da: Mine forældre kan godt lide at vandre i bjergene.
translations.ja: 両親は山歩きが好きです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, 1st person singular; nominative plural agreeing with 'Eltern'; marks possession.
Common noun (plural); subject of the sentence in nominative plural.
Finite verb, present tense, 3rd person plural; main predicate meaning to hike.
Manner adverb indicating liking or preference; modifies the verb.
Contraction of the preposition 'in' with the definite article 'dem'; marks location (dative) for the prepositional phrase.
Common noun (neuter); object of the preposition 'im'; dative singular.

sentences.target: Vom Balkon sehe ich ein fernes Gebirge.
sentences.reading: /fɔm balˈkɔŋ ˈzeːə ɪç aɪ̯n ˈfɛʁnəs ɡəˈbɪʁɡə/

translations.de: Vom Balkon sehe ich ein fernes Gebirge.
translations.ipa: /fɔm balˈkɔŋ ˈzeːə ɪç aɪ̯n ˈfɛʁnəs ɡəˈbɪʁɡə/
translations.en: From the balcony I see a distant mountain range.
translations.es: Desde el balcón veo una cordillera lejana.
translations.fr: Depuis le balcon, je vois une chaîne de montagnes lointaine.
translations.it: Dal balcone vedo una catena montuosa lontana.
translations.zh-Hans: 从阳台上我能看到远处的山脉。
translations.yue: 我喺露台見到遠處嘅山脈。
translations.ru: С балкона я вижу далёкий горный хребет.
translations.pt: Da varanda vejo uma cordilheira ao longe.
translations.he: מהמרפסת אני רואה רכס הרים רחוק.
translations.tr: Balkondan uzak bir dağ silsilesi görüyorum.
translations.vi: Từ ban công tôi thấy một dãy núi xa.
translations.ar: من الشرفة أرى سلسلة جبال بعيدة.
translations.nl: Vanaf het balkon zie ik een verre bergketen.
translations.uk: З балкона я бачу далекий гірський хребет.
translations.hu: Az erkélyről egy távoli hegyláncot látok.
translations.hi: बालकनी से मुझे दूर की पर्वतमाला दिखती है।
translations.pl: Z balkonu widzę odległe pasmo górskie.
translations.el: Από το μπαλκόνι βλέπω μια μακρινή οροσειρά.
translations.nb: Fra balkongen ser jeg en fjern fjellkjede.
translations.id: Dari balkon saya melihat pegunungan di kejauhan.
translations.sv: Från balkongen ser jag en bergskedja långt borta.
translations.ro: De pe balcon văd un lanț muntos îndepărtat.
translations.da: Fra altanen ser jeg en fjern bjergkæde.
translations.ja: バルコニーから遠くの山脈が見えます。

Common noun (masculine); object of the preposition 'Vom'; dative singular.

Common noun (neuter); direct object of 'sehe'; accusative singular.
